title: arj
html:
arj

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

arj a /path/to/output-file /path/to/input-file
arj p /path/to/output-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA >output-file
arj a x output-file
arj e x /path/to/output-dir/
excerpt: arj File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged arj a /path/to/output-file /path/to/input-file arj p /path/to/output-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA >output-file arj a x
